bonuses.stat: Gain Minor Aegis at all times, reducing your damage taken from Dungeon, Trial, and Arena Monsters by 5%.

When you overheal yourself or a group member, you create a pool of Kyne's Blessing under the target for 4 seconds. You and group members standing in Kyne's Blessing restore 9-420 Stamina and Magicka every 1 second. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds.
